title: Sita Mata Wildlife Sanctuary
tagline: Sita Mata Wildlife Sanctuary — wildlife reserve of Rajasthan

overview.short: The Sita Mata Wildlife Sanctuary is a wildlife sanctuary situated in Pratapgarh and Chittaurgarh districts of Rajasthan Rajasthan, India, declared as a protected forest area by the
overview.description: The Sita Mata Wildlife Sanctuary is a wildlife sanctuary situated in Pratapgarh and Chittaurgarh districts of Rajasthan Rajasthan, India, declared as a protected forest area by the Government of Rajasthan Notification No. F 11 (9) Revenue/8/79, dated 2/11/1979. It is a dense forest, with an area of 422.95 square kilometers, which is about 40% of the total land area of the district. The land is undulating because of the confluence of three different formations — Malwa Plateau, the Vindhyachal Hills and Aravali mountain ranges.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Sita Mata Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Sita Mata Wildlife Sanctuary is Oct – Mar. Summers are 28–44°C and winters are 8–25°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Sita Mata Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Maharana Pratap Airport, Udaipur (81 km) and the nearest railway station is Udaipur City (93 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Sita Mata Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Sita Mata Wildlife Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Sita Mata Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Sita Mata Wildlife Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.
